name: Nightbringer GF
description:
The "spooky scary" C'tan to the necrons "skeleton" vibe

Hey gang what's up , been playing Dawn of war definitely edition recently and so I figure it makes sense to have the pov here be the necron lord of Kronus since those necrons seem to be less "I hate you becomea battery" to the nightbringer and more "Hey boss want us to kill more people for ya?" So merry Christmas and Happy holidays

(Female version of the nightbringer from warhammer 40K) (Necron lord POV)
creator: Voltboy1
